title: harness_code_candidate
description: Phase AA.4 — a Meta-Harness proposer Type-B (code change) candidate. The proposed_diff touches ONLY harness-allowlisted files. allowlist_validation_result is populated by the outer-loop driver (AA.7) BEFORE the candidate is written; the proposer never self-validates. A candidate whose allowlist_validation_result.valid is false is never written — the driver emits proposer_rejected_invalid_diff instead.

trial_ids_read.description: IDs of all prior trials the proposer inspected

proposer_reasoning.description: proposer's causal analysis of why prior trials failed

hypothesis.description: specific falsifiable hypothesis this diff tests

predicted_improvement.description: what the proposer expects to change in F1 and why

allowlist_validation_result.description: output of harness_mutation_validator.validate_diff, stamped by the AA.7 driver before the candidate is written
